rationale: Draft resume remains minimal and envelope-bound until promotion or stronger proof settles.
Claim grants guide auth uplift or proof capture but do not themselves confer patient capability.
Verified continuation binds one current lineage, route intent, and subject proof snapshot.
Callback reply stays single-purpose and cannot silently authorize adjacent communication actions.
Message reply stays on the current thread tuple and reuses the canonical communication family.
Booking-manage grants stay bound to the current booking tuple and one writable patient shell.
Waitlist actions are tightly time-bound and must replay as settlement, not as a second side effect.
Alternative-choice grants narrow to one current ranked offer chain and fail closed on tuple drift.
Pharmacy choice stays on the current request-linked pharmacy tuple and cannot widen into hub or booking flows.
Support reissue recreates only the immediately prior safe minimal scope and supersedes every older link.
Recover-only is an explicit no-grant disposition for stale, legacy, or drifted continuity.
